headline: Clear calendar and no inbound fires — use today to drive progress on the two open Evals UX tickets before the week fills up.

quick_wins.task: Triage AE-1079: draft outline for 'no ground truth' design doc
quick_wins.why: Story is still in To Do; writing a quick outline or bullet-point draft unblocks moving it to In Progress and gets feedback flowing

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake integrations (check env vars / credentials)
quick_wins.why: Both data sources are returning auth errors — you're flying blind on escalations and adoption metrics

must_make_progress.task: AE-744: Advance Justification + Actual vs Expected UX for Evaluators
must_make_progress.why: Major-priority task already In Progress with no due date — momentum matters; push toward a reviewable UX spec or mockup

must_make_progress.task: AE-1079: Write the 'Generated evaluations — no ground truth' design doc
must_make_progress.why: Feeds directly into Evals adoption OKR and is a dependency for the broader evaluators initiative

must_communicate_with.about: Align on no-ground-truth evaluation approach and any dependency on context engineering or memory work
Confirm that the evaluator UX (AE-744) covers both low-code and coded paths in 26.4 scope

must_report_status.note: Next bi-weekly TR will expect an update on Evals; prepare a short status blurb this week

agents_in_production.vs_goal: Snowflake auth failed — fix credentials to restore dashboard

flags: Salesforce integration is broken (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Fix ASAP or escalate to IT.
Snowflake metrics connection is broken (empty password) — adoption dashboards and MBR data are inaccessible.
Both Jira tickets have no due dates set — consider adding target dates to create external accountability.
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in the OKR doc — confirm whether any of your Evals work is a dependency or blocker.

outcomes.business_impact: No concrete business-moving activity detected yet today — restoring Salesforce and Snowflake access is the highest-leverage action to regain visibility into customer health and escalations.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals UX work (AE-744, AE-1079) directly supports the Agents OKR for evaluation adoption, but adoption metrics are currently unmeasurable due to broken Snowflake credentials.

slack_summary: No meetings, no fires — today is a maker day. Top priorities: push AE-744 (Evaluator UX) toward a reviewable state and draft the no-ground-truth design doc for AE-1079. Also critical: fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so you can see escalation and adoption data again. Zero meetings today.
